build_system: tsc for compilation, tsx for running scripts directly
test_framework: No test runner configured - validation is via TypeScript compilation
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compiles. 2. Ensure seed-demo.ts can be referenced by package.json script.
environment_constraints: Open internet access. No running PostgreSQL database in sandbox, so cannot execute seed. Validation is compilation-only.
contribution_requirements: Seed file must run AFTER main seed.ts. Must look up existing IDs (care_home_id, user IDs, resident IDs) from seeded data. Must use same Pool/pg pattern as seed.ts.
key_patterns: seed.ts uses pg Pool directly, helper functions daysAgo/daysFromNow/dateStr/rand/randInt. Uses client.query with parameterized queries. Wraps in BEGIN/COMMIT transaction. References care_homes by email lookup, users by email, residents by room_number.
directory_structure: backend/src/utils/ contains seed.ts and migrate.ts. backend/migrations/ contains 001-014 SQL files. backend/package.json has scripts including seed.
